bird.name: 欧亚鵟
bird.summary: 欧亚鵟 (学名：Buteo buteo)，原称普通鵟，是生存在欧亚大陆和非洲部分地区的一种鹰形目猛禽。欧亚鵟原为普通鵟的指名亚种（Buteo buteo buteo），后来将分于欧亚大陆西部和非洲地区的物种叫欧亚鵟（Buteo buteo），分布在亚洲东部地区的叫东方𫛭（日本𫛭…

locations.name: 蘇格蘭
locations.summary: 蘇格蘭（英語、低地蘇格蘭語：Scotland，英語：/ˈskɒt.lənd/），又稱為阿尔巴（蘇格蘭蓋爾語：Alba，發音：[ˈal̪ˠapə] ），是一個西歐國家，为英國的一個構成國。蘇格蘭位於大不列顛島北部，英格兰之北，被大西洋環繞包…

locations.name: 威爾斯
locations.summary: 威尔士（威爾斯語：Cymru〔發音：[ˈkəm.rɨ] 〕；英語：Wales〔英語發音：/weɪlz/〕），是一個西歐國家，为英國的一個構成國。 威爾斯位于大不列顛島西南部，东界英格蘭，西临圣乔治海峡，南面布里斯托尔湾，北靠爱尔兰海。威爾…

locations.name: 英格兰
locations.summary: 英格蘭（英語：England；古英語：Englaland），又稱作英國、英倫，漢語舊稱“英吉利”，為英國的構成國之一，位於大不列顛島東南部，蘇格蘭以南，威爾斯以東，是英國面積最大、人口最多、經濟最發達的一個地区。雖然就傳統上一般可以認為其…

locations.name: 黑海
locations.summary: 黑海是欧亚大陆的一个陆间海，被欧洲、高加索和安那托利亞半岛所包围。黑海通过博斯普鲁斯海峽之後進入另一個陸間海—馬摩拉海，通過達達尼爾海峽後与地中海的爱琴海区域相联。西亚和东欧被这一系列水体分隔开来。黑海在北面通过刻赤海峽与亞速海相连。流入…

locations.name: 中华人民共和国

relations.subject: 欧亚鵟
relations.evidence: In these northern quarters, the common buzzard is present typically only in summer but is a year-around resident of a hearty bit of southern Sweden and some of southern Norway. Outside of Europe, it is a resident of northern Turkey (largely close to the Black Sea) otherwise occurring mainly as a passage migrant or winter visitor in the remainder of Turkey, Georgia, sporadically but not rarely in Azerbaijan and Armenia, northern Iran (largely hugging the Caspian Sea) to northern Turkmenistan. Further north though its absent from either side of the northern Caspian Sea, the common buzzard is found in much of western Russia (though exclusively as a breeder) including all of the Central Federal District and the Volga Federal District, all but the northernmost parts of the Northwestern and Ural Federal Districts and nearly the southern half of the Siberian Federal District, its farthest easterly occurrence as a breeder

relations.subject: 欧亚鵟
relations.evidence: The common buzzard generally inhabits the interface of woodlands and open grounds; most typically the species lives in forest edge, small woods or shelterbelts with adjacent grassland, arables or other farmland
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 欧亚鵟
relations.evidence: Biological conservation, 43(2), 145–158. Mostly resident buzzards live in lowlands and foothills, but they can live in timbered ridges and uplands as well as rocky coasts, sometimes nesting on cliff ledges rather than trees
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

relations.subject: 欧亚鵟
relations.evidence: The lack of affect may be due to the buzzard's adaptability as well as its relatively short, terrestrially-based food chain, which exposes them to less risk of contamination and population depletions than raptors that prey more heavily on water-based prey (such as some large eagles) or other birds (such as falcons).Naccari, C., Cristani, M., Cimino, F., Arcoraci, T., & Trombetta, D
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
